temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a light blue button-down shirt is in a dimly lit office. His phone, a silver flip phone, rings loudly. He pulls it out of his pocket, looks at the screen, and answers it. (Storyline: The scene opens with a character being interrupted by a phone call, setting a tense and urgent mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, persistent phone ringing.)
(00:03-00:05) The man listens to the person on the phone, his expression serious and concerned. He holds the phone to his ear with one hand while looking down, appearing deep in thought. (Storyline: The man's serious reaction to the phone call confirms that the news he is receiving is significant and problematic.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Concerned, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: The phone call is now quiet, with only ambient office sounds.)
